title: Immersion +
description:
Don't play vanilla, play this!
This modpack aims to create the most inmersive experience while keeping the vanilla feel.
body:
# Immersion + 
### Don't play vanilla, play this!
----------------------------------------------
This modpack contains more than 100 mods to make the Vanilla Minecraft experience much more inmersive using lots of QoL mods, adding shader support, optimizing the game and much more!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/S9dzbSzWisM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Also support the mod developers for their great job!


![Desc. image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/528d6d9ec35c2daa30e3b525e0e3d7d92a3ed789.png)
----------------------------------------
### Projects that need attribution
[xali's Enhanced Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-vanilla)

[Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether)
